user_query:
I need your help turning our latest stock update into a grounded, member-friendly announcement and a clean data export.

Inputs to use:
- input/inventory/stock.csv (our current stock list)
- input/specs/ (folder of per-SKU spec JSON files)
- input/announce_draft.txt (a rough draft I typed up)

Please do the following and save the specified outputs:
1) Build a filtered table of new arrivals by joining inventory to specs:
   - Include only rows from input/inventory/stock.csv where status == "new" AND a matching specs file exists at input/specs/<sku>.json.
   - For each included row, extract brand, scale, subject, type, and length_mm from the specs JSON and combine them with the CSV fields title, price_usd, and qty_on_hand.
   - Save to output/new_arrivals.csv with columns in this exact order: sku,title,brand,scale,type,subject,length_mm,qty,price_usd. Sort rows by sku ascending.
2) Generate a consistency report to make this verifiable:
   - Count how many inventory rows have status == "new" (total_inventory_new_count).
   - Count how many new arrivals were included in output/new_arrivals.csv (included_in_new_arrivals).
   - List SKUs of new arrivals excluded because their specs JSON was missing (excluded_due_to_missing_specs: array).
   - List SKUs found in input/specs/ that do not appear in the inventory CSV at all (orphan_specs: array). Do not hardcode SKUs; inspect the directory.
   - Save this as pretty-printed JSON to output/consistency_report.json with the keys shown above.
3) Rewrite input/announce_draft.txt into a concise forum post for our members and save it to output/announce_post.md with these constraints:
   - Friendly, informative tone; keep it under 180 words; no emojis; avoid hype and fluff.
   - Clearly state the count of new arrivals included in output/new_arrivals.csv.
   - Name the top three included new arrivals by qty_on_hand (descending; tie-break by sku ascending) in a sentence. Use their titles and scales.
   - Add a short bullet list of included items with qty_on_hand >= 3 in the format: "SKU – Title (Scale)". Derive all details from output/new_arrivals.csv so it stays consistent.
   - Do not mention any items that aren’t included in output/new_arrivals.csv.

Notes:
- All paths are relative to the workspace. Don’t fetch anything from the internet.
- Every number and field in the post that references products must be grounded in the data you computed for output/new_arrivals.csv.
- The outputs should be fully reproducible from the given inputs. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
